jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Miniklub
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
